entities.name: SORGHUM AND MILLET IMPROVEMENT PROGRAM
entities.description: A program that conducted a review of seed policies in Mozambique

entities.name: SEED POLICIES
entities.description: The regulatory frameworks governing the production and distribution of seeds in Mozambique

entities.name: MOZAMBIQUE
entities.description: The country where the seed policy review was conducted and where productivity losses are occurring

entities.name: MINISTERIO DA AGRICULTURA E DESENVOLVIMENTO RURAL
entities.description: The national agricultural ministry of Mozambique collaborating on the seed policy review

entities.name: MICHIGAN STATE UNIVERSITY
entities.description: An academic institution collaborating on the seed policy review in Mozambique

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY GAINS
entities.description: Economic benefits lost annually due to the failure of the national seed system

entities.name: NATIONAL SEED SYSTEM
entities.description: The infrastructure and processes responsible for disseminating new crop varieties

entities.name: GRAIN
entities.description: Cereal crops identified on the national registration list

entities.name: GRAIN LEGUME CROPS
entities.description: Leguminous crops identified on the national registration list

entities.name: NATIONAL REGISTRATION LIST
entities.description: The official list of crop varieties identified for dissemination

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: An improved grain crop variety failing to be disseminated

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: An improved grain crop variety failing to be disseminated

entities.name: FOOD INSECURITY
entities.description: A state of lacking reliable access to sufficient affordable nutritious food, linked to seed system failure

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: The state of being extremely poor, linked to seed system failure and productivity loss
